data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for reporting on breach rates and compensation costs.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Reporting on breach rates and compensation cost'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for reporting but lacks concrete evidence that these reports have been generated or validated in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of reporting mechanisms for breach rates and compensation costs being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
